# @021.is/spine-quality — LLM usage

> Shipping configs for the Spine quality gate (Biome, tsconfig, knip, dependency-cruiser, semgrep, size-limit, vitest). One install, same gate everywhere.

Install (dev): bun add -d @021.is/spine-quality

## Config subpaths (consume via `extends` / `require`)
- `biome.json`: `{ "extends": "@021.is/spine-quality/biome" }`
- `tsconfig.json`: `{ "extends": "@021.is/spine-quality/tsconfig" }` (or `/tsconfig-next`)
- `knip.json`: `{ "extends": "@021.is/spine-quality/knip" }`
- `.dependency-cruiser.cjs`: `module.exports = require("@021.is/spine-quality/dependency-cruiser")`
- `size-limit`: `{ "extends": "@021.is/spine-quality/size-limit" }`
- semgrep: `--config "$(node -p "require.resolve('@021.is/spine-quality/semgrep')")"`
- vitest: `@021.is/spine-quality/vitest`

## Imports
- `import { QUALITY_CHECKS } from "@021.is/spine-quality"` — the doctrine summary

## API
- `QUALITY_CHECKS` — `readonly QualityCheck[]`: every gate the quality job runs (biome, tsc, type-coverage, knip, madge, dependency-cruiser, semgrep, spine-lint, npm audit, vitest, coverage, size-limit)
- `QualityCheck` — `{ id; category; description; tool; blocking }`

## Example
```json
// biome.json
{ "extends": "@021.is/spine-quality/biome" }
```
```json
// tsconfig.json (Next app)
{ "extends": "@021.is/spine-quality/tsconfig-next" }
```

## Notes
- Dev dependency, config-only (plus the `QUALITY_CHECKS` manifest exported from JS).
- Override a check in your local config if genuinely wrong, and document why in AGENTS.md.
